steps.title: Find the needed verb
steps.content: The sentence has a singular subject, the atomic structure of an element, followed by an object, the element's place on the periodic table. The blank must supply a finite main verb that agrees with the singular subject and completes the clause.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice A is an infinitive, Choice B is a participle, and Choice D is a perfect participial phrase. None can serve alone as the main verb of the sentence. The sentence needs the singular present-tense verb that makes the structure determine the element's place. The answer is C.
